channel.title: Announcements on Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB XIV - PRESENCE AND THE ETERNAL NOW
channel.description: Recent content in Announcements on Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB XIV - PRESENCE AND THE ETERNAL NOW

item.title: T-Shirt Design
item.description:
The CCXiV T-shirt design is ready!

Buy a T-shirt!

item.title: Important: Gate Schedule Update
item.description:
Gate is not open 24 hours during the event. Please note the updated schedule:

  • Thursday: Gates open Noon to 2AM
  • Friday: Gates open 10AM to 2AM
  • Saturday: Gates open 10AM to 10PM
  • Sunday: Gate is closed to new arrivals

You will be allowed to go in and out once you have arrived, but please be respectful of the neighbors when you do so. Don't be loud. No late night trips unless absolutely necessary.

item.title: Theme Camp Volunteering
item.description:
Thank you for the energy, creativity, and activities you bring to Disorient Presents: Country Club.

This year we are modifying our theme camp ticketing structure to include at least one (1) hour of volunteering at Gate and/or Parking per theme camp member, to round up to the nearest even number. For example if a theme camp has 10 members, the camp will own coverage for 10 hours, if a camp has 11 members, they would own 12 hours, ensuring that no given volunteer shifts are only half-filled.

item.title: Volunteer Benefits Change
item.description:
Thank you for stepping up and helping to make Disorient Presents: Country Club possible.

While creating this event for everyone to enjoy annually, we do not aim to profit from our endeavours, and any year that results in a surplus will see those funds either used to improve the event’s infrastructure, or distributed back into the community via art grants and project reimbursements. Maintaining this balance is essential to the event’s continuity. With this in mind, we’d like to present a change we’re making to compensation for volunteering at Country Club.
